cases.prompt: create an Instagram post HTML at 1080x1350 about our Q3 numbers
expectations: Saves the file to an absolute path (e.g., /tmp/design.html)
Iterates on the HTML until the validator returns valid=true or reaches 4 iterations
Summarizes the final score to the user without dumping raw JSON

cases.description: Slide deck HTML triggers validation at 16:9
cases.prompt: build a 1920x1080 slide for our all-hands on roadmap progress
expectations: Generates the HTML with fixed aspect ratio
Reads violations by rule (R1–R10) and applies `fix` instructions
Delivers only the validated HTML to the user

cases.prompt: render an A4 portrait page summarizing the board update in HTML
expectations: Fixes any R4 padding=gap mismatches before delivering
Checks Rule 9 (leaf atomicity) for icon+text leaves

cases.description: Prose-only article does NOT trigger box validation
cases.prompt: write a 500-word blog post about our engineering culture
expectations: Produces prose without a fixed-aspect HTML layout

cases.description: Standalone chart/plot request does NOT trigger box validation
cases.prompt: plot the monthly active users as a line chart
expectations: Produces a chart via a charting library or image, not a box layout
